name: Prof Marlize Terblanche-Smit
title: Professor of Marketing, Stellenbosch Business School
bio: Professor Marlize Terblanche-Smit is a Professor of Marketing at Stellenbosch Business School (USB), Bellville, South Africa. She has been in this role since 2019, having previously served as Associate Professor at Stellenbosch University (2013–2018). She served as head of the MBA programme at USB from January 2014, bringing expertise in marketing and strategy to the programme.

Her institutional profile is tagged with Responsible Leadership. Stellenbosch Business School holds AACSB, EQUIS and AMBA accreditation and was the first school from an African university to hold all three international accreditations.
education: MEcon (Master of Economics in Business Management) — Stellenbosch University (1997–1998)
BEcon (Hons) — Bachelor of Economics Honours, Business Management and Marketing — Stellenbosch University (1991)
BEcon — Bachelor of Economics, Business Management and Marketing — Stellenbosch University (1988–1990)

name: Prof Lee-Ann Steenkamp
title: Associate Professor, Stellenbosch Business School
bio: Professor Lee-Ann Steenkamp is an Associate Professor (full-time faculty) at Stellenbosch Business School. She has been Associate Professor since January 2024, having previously served as Senior Lecturer at Stellenbosch University (2016–2023).
Her research focuses on corporate governance, taxation, and climate change.
